[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000100 2
1 000000011 2
2 000001000 1
3 001010000 2
4 001000100 2
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a
